mapper.select: SELECT id, log_id, business_id, business_type, file_path, operation_type, retry_count, max_retry, final_fail_reason, handle_status, handle_remark FROM file_exception_handler

SELECT id, log_id, business_id, business_type, file_path, operation_type, retry_count, max_retry, final_fail_reason, handle_status, handle_remark FROM file_exception_handler LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
